notes:
### v1.2.4

#### Fixed
- MeowConnect unsynced state clears after undoing changes. The unsynced roster-change indicator now re-checks the current local snapshot after edits, so toggling a MeowConnect setting back to its previously synced state clears the dirty state without requiring a restart.
- Uninstall data deletion removes LOA Tracker local data. The Windows uninstaller now also removes the product-named LocalAppData folder that stores userlogs.db when the delete local data option is selected, preventing stale databases from surviving a reinstall.
- Dashboard character stat number formatting is consistent. Dashboard character cards now format both iLvl and CP with comma decimals, matching the requested 1700,00 style.
- Non-gold dashboard raid order matches gold earners. Tracked raids shown on non-gold dashboard character cards now follow the configured raid order instead of being reordered by item level, so matching raid sets appear consistently across characters.
- MeowConnect expanded profile stats are rounded. Expanded friend profile rows now show iLvl and CP as whole numbers, matching the compact formatting used in To Do and Tracking.
- MeowConnect clear logs combine gate entries consistently. Manual gate clears and LOA Logs gate clears now combine by character, raid, difficulty, and source, so near-simultaneous Gate 1 and Gate 2 clears show as one multi-gate clear instead of duplicate separate log rows.
- Daily roster scraping can add newly discovered characters. The automatic roster scrape now upserts scraped characters instead of only updating existing names, so new character IDs found on LostArk Bible are inserted into the local roster database.
- Roster scraping preserves local character settings. Scraper refreshes no longer overwrite existing character gold-earner flags or manual display order when updating item level and combat power, preventing dashboard gold progress and roster ordering from being reset.
- To Do roster event toggles keep scroll position. Marking the temporary Argeos winter roster event complete now updates the To Do matrix locally without triggering the component's own full matrix reload, preventing the table from jumping back to the top.

#### Improved
- MeowConnect clear logs use completion timestamps. LOA Logs entries now use fight_start plus encounter duration when duration is available, so combined multi-gate clears sort by the actual final gate completion time instead of only the pull start.
- MeowConnect clear log rows are more compact. Participant avatars now use a balanced stacked size with two rows of four, plus a plus indicator when more than eight players are present. The full player list was replaced by a concise character line.
- MeowConnect clear log character labels are clearer. Clear log rows now show class icons with the cleared character names in a compact pipe-separated line instead of the old "with character" wording.
- MeowConnect settings are more compact. The Reset Window info card was removed, Raid Visibility now sits in the top settings row with tighter raid labels, and incoming friend requests now show a notification badge on the MeowConnect Settings tab plus a highlighted notice in the Friends panel.
- MeowConnect sync settings show connection state. The Sync card now shows how many characters are connected in roster settings, whether roster changes are waiting to be uploaded, and when the last MeowConnect snapshot was synced.
- MeowConnect friend requests are visible globally. Incoming MeowConnect friend requests now appear in the app header as a compact avatar notification, so users can notice pending requests from Dashboard or any other tab and jump straight to MeowConnect Settings.
- Roster settings show the daily roster update cooldown. The character roster header now shows subtle background info for whether the daily roster update is available, currently running, or how long remains until the next 24-hour update window opens.
- Dashboard roster event labels show both active events. Roster-wide calendar task labels now stack Chaos Gate and World Boss icons when both events are active, with a compact pipe-separated event label spanning the full card underneath.
- Dashboard header stat labels are tighter. Dashboard header stat cards now use a compact icon/status row with a full-width label underneath, giving raids, dailies, weeklies, event, and gold-earner labels a more consistent layout.
- Dashboard event status text has more room. Dashboard stat cards now reserve less dead space around the icon/status row, preventing labels like Done Today from truncating while keeping the header stats compact.
- MeowConnect static reservations have separate visual states. Static characters reserved with you keep the shared-static styling, while static reservations you are not part of now use a quieter grey frame with a subtle red warning tint.

#### Added
- Roster settings can soft-remove characters. Roster settings now has a bin action that hides a character locally without deleting its database row. Removed characters are filtered from roster, dashboard, To Do, Tracking, MeowConnect, and local LOA Logs matching views.

#### Changed
- MeowConnect Supabase encounter snapshots store duration. The Supabase schema and upload mapping now include encounter duration so refreshed remote log snapshots can use the same completion timestamp logic as local LOA Logs data.
- Local database schema updated for character removal. userlogs.db now migrates to schema version 15 with a removed_from_roster flag on conf_character, allowing future scrapes to preserve locally removed characters instead of re-adding them to the UI.
- Application version metadata updated for 1.2.4. package.json, package-lock.json, tauri.conf.json, and the generated Rust app version now point at 1.2.4.
